title: Tarzan and His Mate
director: Cedric Gibbons, James C. McKay, Jack Conway
writer: Edgar Rice Burroughs, James Kevin McGuinness, Howard Emmett Rogers
actors: Johnny Weissmuller, Maureen O'Sullivan, Neil Hamilton
plot: The idyllic life of Tarzan and Jane is challenged by men on safari who come seeking ivory, and come seeking Jane as well.
